description: Application observability with judgment: structured JSON logs with correlation IDs, log levels that mean something, RED/USE metrics without cardinality bombs, trace-context propagation, symptom-based alerting, honest health checks. Includes /observability:review.

Codex fidelity: 1 faithful, 1 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).
